◎译　　名　生而为人
◎片　　名　Being a Human Person
◎年　　代　2020
◎产　　地　英国 / 瑞典
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　英语 / 瑞典语
◎上映日期　2020-10-16(英国)
◎IMDb评分  7.6/10 from 395 users

◎片　　长　90分钟
◎导　　演　弗雷德·斯科特 Fred Scott
◎主　　演　罗伊·安德森 Roy Andersson


◎简　　介  

　　“Art describes the eternal”, Roy Andersson muses on the set of About Endlessness (44th HKIFF), his apparent final feature summoning poetry from life’s most mundane nooks to reveal profound truths about human existence. In an affectionate and often enchanting tribute, director Fred Scott immerses himself in the Swedish master’s vision of cinema, examining his use of trompe l’oei...

◎获奖情况  

　　第23届英国独立电影奖(2020)
　　最佳纪录片(提名)
